description: Questo sub-concetto riguarda la capacità del materiale di assorbire o trasmettere le vibrazioni. I materiali 'duri' spesso trasmettono le vibrazioni, mentre quelli 'morbidi' le smorzano.
positive: The cushion absorbed the impact, a gentle *amortiguación* felt through my spine.
My hand resting on the foam felt a complete *Dämpfung* of the engine’s hum.
The latex gloves silenced the vibrations when I touched the machinery.
A soft *amortecimento* resonated through my fingertips as I pressed the pad.
I felt the *dämpning* of the tremor through the padded bench, a quiet relief.
The thick felt lining muted the clatter, a noticeable *atténuation* against my ear.
The vibration was almost imperceptible through the gel pad—a remarkable *smorzamento*.
The cushioned seat absorbed the jolts, providing a smooth *amortiguación* on the ride.
My wrist felt secure and stable, the foam offering excellent *dämpfung*.
The rubber mat softened the impact, a pleasant *amortecimento* under my feet.
I experienced minimal vibration through the padded armrests—a clear *Dämpfung*.
The polymer's inherent *smorzamento* prevented any harshness from reaching my hand.
A subtle *amortiguación* enveloped my body as I leaned against the padded wall.
The vibration seemed to vanish entirely thanks to the *dämpning* material.
The *atténuation* through the soft material was so pronounced it was almost silent.
The cushioned platform provided a welcome *amortecimento* against the floor's tremor.
My elbow felt surprisingly stable, the foam providing a good *Dämpfung* effect.
The vibration was significantly reduced, thanks to the material's *smorzamento* properties.
I barely felt the rumble; the padding offered exceptional *dämpning*.
A quiet *amortiguación* enveloped the impact, making it nearly unnoticeable.
negative: The metal bar resonated with the engine's pulse, a jarring vibration through my hand.
I felt every tremor through the rigid frame, a clear *Resonanz* in my bones.
The glass table amplified the vibrations, a sharp *Resonanz* against my chest.
The bare floor transmitted the bass directly into my feet, a strong *Resonanz*.
The steel frame vibrated intensely, creating a noticeable *Resonanz* in my legs.
Each footstep echoed through the concrete, a persistent *Resonanz* felt in my torso.
The unyielding surface amplified the hum, a distinct *Resonanz* through my arm.
The metal railing pulsed with the train's rhythm, a harsh *Resonanz* against my palm.
The ceramic tile transmitted the noise directly, a sharp *Resonanz* in my head.
I could feel the vibrations amplified, a distinct *Resonanz* traveling up my spine.
The rigid platform sent every tremor straight through me—a powerful *Resonanz*.
The unpadded chair amplified the vibrations—a clear *Resonanz* in my hips.
The metal desk vibrated with the typing, a distracting *Resonanz* against my wrist.
The hard surface amplified the hum, creating a palpable *Resonanz* in my shoulders.
Each impact resonated through the frame, a noticeable *Resonanz* in my ankles.
The concrete floor amplified the tremor, a significant *Resonanz* in my feet.
The unyielding metal created a strong *Resonanz* that I felt in my entire body.
The vibrations were amplified, a clear *Resonanz* through the armrest.
The un-dampened vibration created a distinct *Resonanz* against my ribs.
The structure transmitted the noise directly, a harsh *Resonanz* through my jaw.
